description:
Responsibilities：
1. Be responsible for developing and implementing backend business features, delivering high-quality code on time according to product requirements
2. Participate in backend API development and maintenance, including interface design, parameter validation, and exception handling
3. Participate in database design and optimization, write SQL queries, and assist in table structure design and index optimization
4. Participate in code reviews, learn from quality code, and continuously improve coding ability and code quality
5. Participate in the development of AI feature modules and implement AI-related functions under the guidance of senior engineers
6. Participate in the development of blockchain feature modules and implement Web3-related functions under the guidance of senior engineers
7. Write functional tests and unit tests to ensure code correctness and stability
8. Participate in bug fixing and troubleshooting, and work with the QA team to complete testing tasks
9. Participate in writing technical documentation, including API docs, operation manuals, and technical design documents
10. Continuously learn new backend technologies and best practices to improve technical capability
Requirements：
Education & Experience
- Associate degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Engineering, or related fields
- 1–3 years of backend development experience; fresh graduates are also welcome
- Strong interest in backend development and willingness to deeply learn backend and AI technologies
Tech Stack Requirements
- Familiar with at least one backend programming language among Python, Go, Node.js, and Java
- Understanding of RESTful API design principles and ability to independently implement simple APIs
- Basic knowledge of SQL and ability to write simple database queries
- Basic knowledge of Git version control
- Basic knowledge of Linux commands
- Basic knowledge of Docker container technology
Fundamental Knowledge
- Understanding of HTTP/HTTPS protocol fundamentals
- Understanding of JSON/XML data formats
- Understanding of WebSocket or other real-time communication technologies
- Understanding of basic algorithms and data structures
Soft Skills:
- Strong learning ability and curiosity, with a willingness to proactively learn new technologies
- Good communication skills and the ability to clearly express ideas
- Good teamwork and willingness to actively cooperate with the team
- Good problem-solving ability and the ability to resolve technical issues under guidance
- Serious and responsible work attitude, with a strong sense of ownership and initiative
Bonus Qualifications
- Experience with personal projects or open-source projects
- Academic or practical experience related to AI/machine learning
- Academic or practical experience related to blockchain
- Relevant certifications (such as AWS, Oracle, etc.)
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Experience using AI coding assistants (such as Copilot)
